scripts.desktop:start: npm run editor:build && mkdir -p desktop/editor/dist && rm -rf desktop/editor/dist/* && cp -r editor/dist/* desktop/editor/dist/ && cd desktop && npm start
scripts.desktop:build: npm run editor:build && mkdir -p desktop/editor/dist && rm -rf desktop/editor/dist/* && cp -r editor/dist/* desktop/editor/dist/ && mkdir -p desktop/server && rm -rf desktop/server/* && cp -r server/* desktop/server/ && mkdir -p desktop/neuralfn && rm -rf desktop/neuralfn/* && cp -r neuralfn/* desktop/neuralfn/ && cp requirements.txt desktop/ && cd desktop && npm run dist
